title: compute_nco_enrichment_v1 — chain action for nco_inside_vs_outside_inversion
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='compute_nco_inside_vs_outside_inversion'. Reads a previously-captured tract_classifications_v1 envelope (by layer_id) and emits a typed nco_enrichment_result_v1 envelope: 2×2 crosstab of {target_class} × inside_inversion + Fisher exact (two-sided + one-sided-greater) + odds ratio. Manuscript NCO headline. Promoted from the browser-side renderer (`atlases/meiosis/pages/hub/nco.js` renderInVsOut) so the catalogue brain can dispatch the chain via this action instead of treating it as `stale: "promotion_from_browser_js"`.

source_layer_id.description: layer_id of the tract_classifications_v1 envelope to test on.

source_layer_ids.description: Optional alias for multi-source converters; this single-source chain uses source_layer_id.

target_class.description: Which NCO-like class to test for inside-vs-outside enrichment. Default MOSAIC_SHORT (the gene-conversion-in-inversion signal that is the manuscript headline). Set to 'NCO' for a sensitivity check on the short-NCO bucket.
